legal_notice.title: Scope Anchor Seal
content: This form seals an agreed position, scope, or decision at the exact moment of submission.
Use this when a project scope has been agreed, a negotiation has reached a position you need to anchor,
or terms have been discussed verbally and you need a written sealed record before a formal contract is signed.
**This is not a legal contract.** It is a tamper-evident record of your position at a specific moment.
This seal complements legal documentation — it does not replace it.

fields.label: Your Full Name
fields.description: The name attached to this sealed record.

fields.label: Other Party or Parties
fields.description: Who is the other party? Company name, individual, or role.
fields.placeholder: Acme Corp / Client: First Last / Employer: Company Name

fields.label: Agreement Type
fields.description: What kind of scope or agreement is being sealed?
fields.placeholder: Project Scope / Contract Terms / Salary Negotiation / Settlement / Business Terms

fields.label: Date of Agreement or Position
fields.description: The date this scope was agreed or position was reached. Format: YYYY-MM-DD

fields.label: Agreed Scope or Position — Exact
fields.description: State exactly what was agreed. Include deliverables, timelines, compensation, exclusions.
fields.placeholder: State the agreed scope, terms, or position precisely. Include all material details.

fields.label: What Is Explicitly Excluded (Optional but Recommended)
fields.description: What is NOT included? Explicit exclusions prevent the most common form of scope creep.
fields.placeholder: List what is explicitly outside this scope.

fields.label: Context
fields.description: How was this agreement reached? Verbal conversation, email exchange, meeting?
fields.placeholder: Describe the context in which this agreement was reached.

fields.label: Supporting Files (Optional)
fields.description: Upload screenshots of email chains, message threads, or documents supporting this agreement.

fields.label: Declaration
options: I affirm this record accurately represents my understanding of the agreed scope or position at the time of sealing.
I understand this submission is immutable — it cannot be altered after sealing.
I understand the Sovereign Trace Protocol is not a legal contract and does not constitute legal advice.

steps: Sealing — Sealed with a FROZEN-2.0 triple-time cryptographic stamp. Permanent.
Ledger entry — Enters the Sovereign Trace ledger with your name, timestamp, and SHA-256 hash.
Notification — You receive your ledger entry ID and SHA-256 hash.
after_submit.footer:
Share the ledger entry ID with the other party if appropriate.
The seal is permanent. The seal is the anchor.

Sovereign Trace Protocol | Sheldon K. Salmon | aionsystem2026@gmail.com
